changelog:
🐛 Fixed Copy JSON actions on Safari/iOS and other strict clipboard devices.
✨ Update-available toasts are now clickable and open update details consistently.
🐛 Fixed local credential import to require a successful refresh and preserve upstream expiry/region data.
🐛 Fixed tool_result image extraction for Claude/OpenAI tool outputs.
🛠 Improved long-session tool history cleanup, duplicate tool-result handling, and oversized Kiro payload truncation.
✨ Improved Claude 4.6+ / 4.8 context-window detection and Responses parallel tool-call grouping.
